_meta.note: Execution rubric (Slice 6.x) — per-dim agent config. Backend dims (E1-E5) are graded only, no agent mutations. UI dims (E6-E10) use the same per-dim agent pattern as agents.json.

E1.description: POST /v1/tenants/:tenantId/apps/:appId/execute creates AppExecution row with correct initial state (status=running, currentStepIndex=0, totalSteps, machineId populated)
E1.scoring: 10 = correct response shape + DB state; 5 = correct HTTP status but wrong shape; 0 = wrong status or exception

E2.description: GET /v1/platform/apps/:appId/executions/:id returns currentStepIndex, totalSteps, currentStepName, lastHeartbeatAt, machineType, durationSeconds
E2.scoring: 10 = all fields present + correct types; 5 = some fields missing; 0 = wrong shape

E3.description: Lifecycle webhooks fire at correct transitions (execution.started, step_completed, completed) with signed X-Lookout-Signature header
E3.scoring: 10 = all events fired + HMAC valid; 5 = some events missing; 0 = no webhooks

E4.description: Concurrency policy enforced — second trigger on App with concurrencyPolicy=none returns 409 DISPATCH_REJECTED while first is running
E4.scoring: 10 = rejection with correct error code; 5 = rejection with wrong shape; 0 = not rejected

E5.description: POST /v1/tenants/:tid/apps/:aid/cancel/:execId → execution marked cancelling, then cancelled after grace period; Fly machine destroyed
E5.scoring: 10 = full flow + machine destroyed; 5 = status update but machine stays; 0 = no cancel

E6.prompt: Edit ONLY: src/components/platform/PlatformJobsTab.tsx. Improve the executions list rendering on the Jobs tab. (Placeholder — fill in after first grading round.)
E6.notes: Initial placeholder; reflect.mjs will populate after first run.

E7.prompt: Edit ONLY: src/components/platform/PlatformJobsTab.tsx. Progress bar for running executions must show 'Step N of M — {stepName}' with a filled-bar visualisation. (Placeholder — fill in after first grading round.)

E8.prompt: Edit ONLY: src/components/platform/PlatformJobsTab.tsx. Add a concurrency warning dialog before triggering an app whose concurrencyPolicy is 'none' or 'replace' when a run is already active. (Placeholder.)

E9.prompt: Edit ONLY: src/components/platform/PlatformJobsTab.tsx (ExecutionDetailDrawer). Ensure the drawer renders step timeline, per-step output, and error details cleanly. (Placeholder.)

E10.prompt: Edit ONLY: src/pages/PlatformAdmin.tsx. The Jobs tab should render the platform tenant's executions clearly with the existing PlatformJobsTab component. Verify the tab is accessible and the platform apps are listed. (Placeholder.)
